$comment: Promotion guard manifest for the MXC config surface (Phase 4a). Declares the dev schema minor, the ACTIVE experimental sub-keys under the top-level 'experimental' object, and tombstones for keys that have been promoted to stable (kept in the wire 'Experimental' struct only so the parser can reject the old experimental spelling with a 'moved to stable' error). check-config-stability.js diffs this against the generated dev schema: a key promoted out of 'experimental' (or removed) without a matching tombstone + minor bump fails CI. Active experimental keys must NOT be top-level; tombstones MUST be top-level. Bump schemaMinor (and devSchemaFile/maxSupported in schema-version.json) in the same commit that promotes a feature.
